name: short_form_hook_retention_rate
definition: Percentage of viewers who watch past 3 seconds (hook hold). Calculated as 3-second views divided by impressions.
target_hint: 45–65% hook retention is strong for cold audience. <35% means rewrite the first 1–3 seconds — try contrarian claim, number, or pattern interrupt.

name: short_form_completion_rate
definition: Percentage of viewers who watch to 80%+ of video length.
target_hint: 25–40% completion for 30–45 sec videos. <15% means middle sags — cut fluff, add pattern interrupt at 50%, or shorten total length.

name: short_form_profile_click_rate
definition: Profile visits or bio link clicks divided by video views, per post average.
target_hint: 1–3% click rate indicates CTA and caption are working. <0.5% means weak end CTA or bio link doesn't match video promise.

name: short_form_signup_attribution
definition: Signups or trials with UTM source tiktok/instagram/youtube_shorts or landing page 'How did you hear about us?' = short-form video.
target_hint: B2B: 5–20 signups/month from consistent 3×/week posting. B2C/mobile: 50–200+ possible with viral hits. Track weekly to identify winning formats.

name: short_form_format_win_rate
definition: Percentage of videos in a format batch (e.g. 'founder talking head') that exceed channel median views by 2×.
target_hint: After 20 videos, one format should show 30%+ win rate. Double down on that format; retire bottom quartile hooks.
